_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Python Generic
author: eggs@pashka.host
description: A generic Python egg with native Git support. Clones or pulls a repo on every start. Supports virtual environments and both pip package installs and removals.
startup: if [ "${AUTO_UPDATE}" == "1" ]; then GIT_ADDR="${GIT_ADDRESS}"; if [[ "${GIT_ADDR}" != *.git ]]; then GIT_ADDR="${GIT_ADDR}.git"; fi; USERNAME_NORM="${USERNAME:-git}"; REPO_URL="https://${USERNAME_NORM}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@${GIT_ADDR}"; BRANCH="${BRANCH:-main}"; if [ ! -d .git ] || [ ! -f .git/config ]; then echo "Cloning repo..."; rm -rf * .git && git clone --branch "$BRANCH" "$REPO_URL" .; else echo "Pulling latest from $BRANCH..."; git fetch origin "$BRANCH" && git reset --hard FETCH_HEAD; fi; fi; export HOME=/home/container; export PYTHONPATH=/home/container/.local/lib/python$(python3 --version 2>&1 | cut -d' ' -f2 | cut -d'.' -f1,2)/site-packages:$PYTHONPATH; if [ "${USE_VENV}" == "1" ]; then if [ ! -d .venv ]; then python3 -m venv .venv; fi; source .venv/bin/activate; fi; if [ -f "/home/container/${REQUIREMENTS_FILE}" ]; then pip install -U --prefix .local -r "/home/container/${REQUIREMENTS_FILE}"; fi; if [ ! -z "${PY_PACKAGES}" ]; then pip install -U --prefix .local ${PY_PACKAGES}; fi; if [ ! -z "${REMOVE_PACKAGES}" ]; then pip uninstall -y ${REMOVE_PACKAGES}; fi; if [ ! -z "${PRE_START_CMD}" ]; then echo "Running pre-start command..."; eval "${PRE_START_CMD}"; fi; export PYTHONUNBUFFERED="${PYTHONUNBUFFERED:-1}"; python3 /home/container/${PY_FILE} ${PY_ARGS}

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Python Generic — Installation Script
# Support: eggs@pashka.host

apt update -y
apt install -y git curl jq file unzip make gcc g++ python3-dev python3-pip python3-venv libtool libffi-dev libssl-dev

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

if [ -z "${GIT_ADDRESS}" ]; then
    echo "No git repo set — skipping clone."
    exit 0
fi

if [[ ${GIT_ADDRESS} != *.git ]]; then
    GIT_ADDRESS=${GIT_ADDRESS}.git
fi

USERNAME_NORM="${USERNAME:-git}"

if [ -z "${ACCESS_TOKEN}" ]; then
    echo "Using anonymous clone."
else
    GIT_ADDRESS="https://${USERNAME_NORM}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@$(echo ${GIT_ADDRESS} | cut -d/ -f3-)"
fi

BRANCH="${BRANCH:-main}"

if [ "$(ls -A /mnt/server)" ]; then
    if [ -d .git ] && [ -f .git/config ]; then
        ORIGIN=$(git config --get remote.origin.url)
        if [ "${ORIGIN}" == "${GIT_ADDRESS}" ]; then
            echo "Pulling latest from ${BRANCH}..."
            git pull origin ${BRANCH}
        else
            echo "Different repo detected — skipping pull."
        fi
    else
        echo "Files found with no git config — skipping to avoid data loss."
        exit 10
    fi
else
    echo "Cloning ${GIT_ADDRESS} (branch: ${BRANCH})..."
    git clone --single-branch --branch ${BRANCH} ${GIT_ADDRESS} .
fi

export HOME=/mnt/server

if [ "${USE_VENV}" == "1" ]; then
    echo "Creating virtual environment..."
    python3 -m venv .venv
    source .venv/bin/activate
fi

if [ -f /mnt/server/${REQUIREMENTS_FILE} ]; then
    echo "Installing requirements from ${REQUIREMENTS_FILE}..."
    pip install -U --prefix .local -r /mnt/server/${REQUIREMENTS_FILE}
fi

if [ ! -z "${PY_PACKAGES}" ]; then
    echo "Installing extra packages..."
    pip install -U --prefix .local ${PY_PACKAGES}
fi

echo "Installation complete."
exit 0

variables.name: Git Repository
variables.description: Full HTTPS URL of the Git repository to clone.

variables.name: Branch
variables.description: Branch to clone and pull from on each start.

variables.name: Git Username
variables.description: Username for authenticating with a private repository.

variables.name: Git Access Token
variables.description: Personal access token for authenticating with a private repository.

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Pulls the latest changes from the repository on every startup.

variables.name: Main File
variables.description: Python file to run at startup.

variables.name: Python Arguments
variables.description: Extra arguments passed to the Python process at startup.

variables.name: Requirements File
variables.description: Path to the pip requirements file to install from.

variables.name: Extra Packages
variables.description: Additional pip packages to install at startup, space-separated.

variables.name: Remove Packages
variables.description: pip packages to uninstall at startup, space-separated.

variables.name: Use Virtual Environment
variables.description: Creates and activates a .venv virtual environment before running.

variables.name: Unbuffered Output
variables.description: Enables unbuffered stdout and stderr for real-time console output.

variables.name: Pre-Start Command
variables.description: Shell command to run after install but before the app starts.
